ipinfo-desc: Waxay bixisaa macluumaad ku saabsan cinwaanka IP-ga.
ipinfo-infobox-temporary-account-help: Cinwaanno IP badan ayaa la xiriira akoonkan ku-meelgaarka ah. Waxaad hadda arkaysaa macluumaadka IP-ga ee cinwaanka IP-ga ugu dambeeyay ee la isticmaalay. [[Special:IPInfo/$1|Eeg macluumaadka IP-ga dhammaan cinwaannada IP-ga]].
ipinfo-property-label-usercount: Qalabyo gaar ah oo ku kala yaalla internet-ka
ipinfo-property-tooltip-behaviors: Noocyada gaarka ah ee hawlaha aaladaha ku jira IP-kan ay sameeyeen ama hore loogu xiriiriyay.
ipinfo-property-tooltip-connectiontypes: Noocyada kala duwan ee aaladaha macmiilka ee lagu arkay IP-kan.
ipinfo-property-tooltip-proxies: Proxy-yada lagu arkay macaamiisha isticmaalaya IP-kan. Tani macnaheedu ma aha in dhammaan taraafikada ka imanaya IP-kan ay tahay shabakadda proxy-ga, balse waxay muujinaysaa in proxy laga helay IP-kan.
ipinfo-property-tooltip-usercount: Celceliska tirada macaamiisha lagu arkay IP-kan ee ay Spur diiwaangelisay. Waxay tixgelisaa dhammaan hawlaha ka yimid IP-kan. Waxaa lagu xisaabiyaa muddo 24 saac ah.
ipinfo-value-active-blocks: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 xanibaada oo firfircoon|$1 xanibaadaha oo firfircoon|0=Ma jiraan xanibaadaha firfircoon}}
ipinfo-value-local-edits: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 tafatir maxalli ah|$1 tafatirro maxalli ah|0=Ma jiraan tafatirro maxalli ah}}
ipinfo-widget-error-default: Macluumaadka IP-ga lama soo heli karo.
ipinfo-widget-error-no-data: Ma jiro xog ku saabsan IP-kan oo ka timid $1.
ipinfo-widget-error-wrong-ip: Cinwaanka IP-ga la bixiyay kuma uusan waafaqsanayn diiwaanka ama dib u eegista
ipinfo-widget-error-ip-no-contributions: Macluumaadka IP-kan lama soo heli karo maadaama aan wax wax ku biirin ah laga samayn.
ipinfo-preference-enable: Ku muuji aaladda macluumaadka IP-ga bogga Special:Contributions ee dadka aan diiwaangashanayn.
ipinfo-preference-use-agreement: Waan oggolahay in aan u isticmaalo macluumaadkan shaqadayda kormeerka iyo ka hortagga kharibaada
ipinfo-preference-agreement-error: Waa in aad hawlgelisaa aaladda IP Information ka hor inta aanad oggolaan shuruudaha isticmaalkeeda.
ipinfo-infobox-use-terms: Aaladda IP Information waxay isticmaashaa xogta MaxMind si ay u muujiso faahfaahin sida goobta, proxy-ga, iyo inta aaladood ee wada isticmaalaya IP-kan.
ipinfo-infobox-disable-instructions: Haddii aad rabto in aad damiso astaantan, waxaad ka samayn kartaa [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|dooqyadaada]].
ipinfo-use-agreement-submit-error: Wax baa qaldamay. Fadlan isku day mar kale. Fariinta khaladka la helay waxay ahayd: $1
ipinfo-rest-access-denied: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku fuliso hawshan
ipinfo-rest-access-denied-blocked-user: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku fuliso hawshan sababtoo ah akoonkaaga waa la xannibay
ipinfo-rest-revision-no-author: Akoonkaaga ma laha oggolaansho uu ku arko qoraaga dib u eegista
ipinfo-rest-revision-invalid-ip: Lama soo heli karo macluumaadka IP-ga ee qoraa aan ahayn IP
ipinfo-rest-revision-registered: Lama soo heli karo macluumaadka IP-ga ee dib u eegisyada isticmaaleyaal diiwaangashan
ipinfo-rest-log-registered: Lama soo heli karo macluumaadka IP-ga ee diiwaannada isticmaaleyaal diiwaangashan
ipinfo-rest-log-default: Lama soo heli karin macluumaadka IP-ga
ipinfo-rest-log-denied: Akoonkaaga ma laha oggolaansho uu ku arko fuliyaha gelitaanka diiwaanka ama gelitaanka diiwaanka laftiisa
ipinfo-beta-feature-description: Qalabka Macluumaadka IP waxa uu ujeedkiisu yahay in uu kormeereyaasha siiyo macluumaad muhiim ah oo ku saabsan cinwaannada IP-ga si uu uga caawiyo hawlahooda. Macluumaadkan waxa laga heli doonaa bogga gaarka ah ee tifaftiraha IP-ga, ee Special:Contributions. Nooc kooban oo macluumaadkan ah ayaa laga heli doonaa daaqad soo baxda oo ku xigta cinwaannada IP-ga ee bogagga [[Special:Log|Diiwaanka]], [[Special:Contributions|wax ku darsiyada]], iyo [[Special:RecentChanges|Isbeddelladii u dambeeyay]].
action-ipinfo: soo hel macluumaad ku saabsan cinwaannada IP-ga ee ku lifaaqan dib u eegisyada ama gelitaannada diiwaanka
right-ipinfo: Soo hel macluumaad ku saabsan cinwaannada IP-ga ee ku lifaaqan dib u eegisyada ama gelitaannada diiwaanka
action-ipinfo-view-basic: Hel muuqaal aasaasi ah oo macluumaadka IP-ga ee ku lifaaqan dib u eegisyada ama gelitaannada diiwaanka
right-ipinfo-view-basic: Hel muuqaal aasaasi ah oo macluumaadka IP-ga ee ku lifaaqan dib u eegisyada ama gelitaannada diiwaanka
action-ipinfo-view-full: Hel muuqaal buuxa oo macluumaadka IP-ga ee ku lifaaqan dib u eegisyada ama gelitaannada diiwaanka
right-ipinfo-view-full: Hel muuqaal buuxa oo macluumaadka IP-ga ee ku lifaaqan dib u eegisyada ama gelitaannada diiwaanka
action-ipinfo-view-log: Eeg diiwaanka cidda gelisay macluumaadka IP-ga
right-ipinfo-view-log: Eeg diiwaanka cidda gelitaanka macluumaadka IP-ga sameysay
group-no-ipinfo: Isticmaalayaasha laga xannibay aaladda IP Information
group-no-ipinfo-member: {{GENDER:$1|laga xannibay aaladda macluumaadka IP |laga xannibay aaladda macluumaadka IP}}
ipinfo-log-header:
Tani waa diiwaan ka kooban:
# Isticmaalka aaladda macluumaadka IP si loo eego macluumaadka IP-yada; iyo
# Isbeddellada lagu sameeyo heerarka gelitaanka isticmaalaha ee aaladda.
log-action-filter-ipinfo-change_access: Qalab la hawlgeliyay ama la naafoyeelay
ipinfo-property-tooltip-asn: Aqoonsi gaar ah oo shabakado loo qoondeeyo gobol, kadibna loo sii qoondeeyo hay’adaha sida dowladaha iyo ISP-yada.
ipinfo-value-deleted-edits: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 tafatir la tirtiray|$1 tafatirro la tirtiray|0=Ma jiraan tafatirro la tirtiray}}
ipinfo-special-ipinfo-sort-explainer: Badhannada ku jira madaxda jadwalka waxaa loo isticmaali karaa in lagu kala saaro jadwalka iyadoo lagu salaynayo qiimaha tiirkaas.
ipinfo-special-ipinfo-no-results: Wax macluumaad IP ah looma heli karo $1.
ipinfo-help-text: Macluumaadka la soo bandhigay wuxuu ka yimaadaa MaxMind iyo [https://docs.spur.us/data-types Spur]. Waxaa dhici karta inuusan si buuxda sax u ahayn.
